arts.ttl: Leeds v Stoke in Championship and more from EFL: football – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 3pm BST games in the Football League Cardiff sack Riza and hand reins to Ramsey Get in touch – email Barry with your thoughts Some pre-match listening: Would you rather watch Leicester play football without scoring a goal for 13 hours or sit through King Lear, Hamlet and all three parts of Henry VI? Is shameless fanboying in the commentary box ever acceptable? And what – if anything - is the difference between the Guardian’s Barney Ronay and Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca? View the Championship table Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer news: £10m-rated Premier League goalkeeper to be targeted by Championship promotion contenders?
arts.sum: Leeds United have allegedly identified a Premier League goalkeeper - worth in the region of £10m - as a potential summer transfer target.

arts.ttl: Leeds United vs Stoke City live - Team news from Elland Road - Stoke-on-Trent Live
arts.sum: Leeds do not want to be playing in this division in August and are on the cusp of securing promotion back to the Premier League, sitting top and level on points with second-placed Burnley, five points ahead of third-placed Sheffield United going into this fixture with three games left to play. They are back at the bet365 Stadium for a home match against Sheffield United on Friday.

arts.ttl: Pressing Leeds United transfer question remains unanswered despite loan ace’s impressive campaign: Opinion
arts.sum: Leeds United are riding the crest of a promotion wave at the moment, but it won’t be long… The post Pressing Leeds United transfer question remains unanswered despite loan ace’s impressive campaign: Opinion appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: ‘Gutted’ – Out-of-contract Stoke City man confirms season-ending injury blow
arts.sum: Stoke City midfielder Jordan Thompson has confirmed his season has been brought to a premature end by injury.… The post ‘Gutted’ – Out-of-contract Stoke City man confirms season-ending injury blow appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s first confirmed summer sale could spark transfer theme for Farke
arts.sum: On the matter of spending limits, inside sources have told Leeds Live that the top brass at United know that every penny needs to count should promotion be secured. This year, Leeds find themselves on the cusp of automatic promotion with a squad that every other Championship manager envies.

arts.ttl: ‘Player of the Season’ – Leeds United player hailed by Simon Grayson
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Dan James should be Championship Player of the Season, according to their former manager Simon… The post ‘Player of the Season’ – Leeds United player hailed by Simon Grayson appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Mateusz Klich wants ‘going up party’
arts.sum: Four points are needed for promotion from Leeds’ final three games, and with Sheffield United heading to Burnley in the evening, there’s every chance that Leeds may only need to get their job done today. Leeds United’s home clash against Stoke City today could be the fixture in which the Whites move within a point of automatic promotion, should all go to plan they could be promoted later in the evening too.

arts.ttl: Leeds set to do something generational at Elland Road for first time in 35 years
arts.sum: Sheffield United play Stoke away from home the Friday prior to Leeds' clash with Bristol City, meaning there are two chances for it all to be over by the time the Whites play next. Elland Road is set to boast a special atmosphere on Easter Monday, with Leeds United on the precipice of automatic promotion.

arts.ttl: I won promotion with Leeds United - this is how players will feel upon going up
arts.sum: Former Leeds United captain Liam Cooper has described how he felt “relief” and “excitement” upon earning promotion to the Premier League in 2020, and hopes the current Whites players can soon experience the same emotions. Cooper and Bielsa will go down in the annals of Leeds United history as being the talismen who led the Whites back to the promised land after a 16-year exile.
